attributes.action: Stop the SEND reform, fix the system and make local authorities accountable.
attributes.additional_details: With the new proposals on SEND reform our children and their parents are losing vital rights, the law was made for a reason, it should always stand, without EHCP’s our children will not thrive, will be made to stay in mainstream schools that with no amount of money thrown at them can meet need, 1.6 billion spread out over all primary and secondary schools in the UK isn’t enough! Even with that money mainstream environments cannot meet need, lives are at stake, our children matter.
attributes.background: Stop the SEND reform, we all know the system is broken but fix it, keep current law in place, don’t replace it with something else.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petitions:

Protect legal right to support for children with SEND
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/764268

Raise SEND funding by £10 billion & stop all new SEND reforms
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/761327

Fine Local Authorities & penalise LA officers who don’t fulfil SEND obligations
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/747917
